panel.title: Claude Code
panel.bannerBypass: Permissions are BYPASSED. Every tool runs without asking. Use only in trusted, sandboxed directories.
panel.bannerPlan: Plan mode — Claude can read and think, but cannot write or run commands.
panel.bannerAccept: Auto-accept edits — Claude will apply file edits without prompting.
panel.bannerDefault: Default — Claude will ask before risky actions.
panel.acpNotFound:
`claude-code-acp` not found on PATH.
This panel now speaks Agent Client Protocol to the Zed-industries bridge, which wraps the regular `claude` CLI.
Install with:
   npm i -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code @zed-industries/claude-code-acp
panel.tipYesExec: Allow this specific command, then retry
panel.tipYesNetwork: Allow this specific URL/domain, then retry
panel.tipYesDefault: Allow this specific file/action, then retry
panel.tipAllowAllWrite: Add an allow-all rule for this tool (Edit/Write), then retry
panel.tipAllowAllExec: Add an allow-all rule for Bash, then retry
panel.tipAllowAllNetwork: Add an allow-all rule for this domain, then retry
panel.tipAllowAllDefault: Allow all invocations of this tool, then retry
panel.tipNo: Deny and stop the current run

settings.workingDirHelp: Absolute path. Claude will see files under this directory.
settings.modelHelp: e.g. claude-opus-4-7 · claude-sonnet-4-6 · claude-haiku-4-5. Empty = CLI default.
settings.additionalDirsHelp: Extra folders Claude may read/edit via --add-dir.
settings.mcpStrict: Use only MCP servers from this file (strict)
settings.injectNoctaliaContextHelp: Tell Claude about the Noctalia IPC surface so it can control the desktop (dark mode, wallpaper, brightness, etc.) directly from chat. Disable for plain code-only behavior.
settings.includePartialMessages: Stream partial messages (more events, more noise)
settings.dangerouslySkipHelp: Overrides permission mode. Equivalent to giving Claude full shell access. Do NOT enable unless running in a throwaway sandbox.
settings.restartHint: Some changes (model, working dir, system prompt) only apply to new sessions. Use /new in chat.
settings.dangerSubheading: These settings can let Claude run arbitrary commands without asking. Use only inside a throwaway sandbox.
settings.resetConfirm: Reset all Claude Code plugin settings to defaults? This won't delete your chat history.

dialog.bypassSkipWarning:
You are about to enable --dangerously-skip-permissions.
Claude will run every tool (including Bash) without prompting.
Use only in a throwaway sandbox.
dialog.bypassModeWarning:
You are about to set permission mode to bypassPermissions.
Claude will run every tool without prompting.

toast.binaryMissing: `claude` CLI not found — install with: npm i -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code

errors.binaryMissing: `claude` CLI not on PATH. Install it with `npm i -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code`.
errors.busy: Claude is still working. Stop it first.
